message:
test(wal): add fused append byte-identical and error-path scratch proof tests (bd-db300.3.8.6)

Two new tests for the fused append_frames hot path:
- test_fused_append_frames_produces_byte_identical_wal_file: raw frame
  bytes via read_frame_into match single-frame append path exactly
- test_append_frames_restores_scratch_on_error: page-size mismatch
  preserves frame_count, scratch capacity, and subsequent append success

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
